description_long: This is a heavily crushed and discarded aluminum beverage can, featuring a blue and white color scheme with visible branding and text. The can is significantly deformed, with deep creases and dents running vertically and horizontally, indicating it has been compressed or stepped on. The surface is marred by dirt and grime, especially around the top and bottom rims, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. The branding 'Hamm's' is prominently displayed in orange on a blue background, with additional text and decorative elements partially obscured by the can's deformation. The top of the can is partially caved in, and the pull tab area is visible but appears damaged or incomplete. The overall appearance is that of a typical piece of street trash found in urban environments, with clear signs of wear and environmental exposure.
description: A crushed, dirty blue and white Hamm's beer can with visible branding and heavy dents, showing signs of prolonged outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Hamm's logo and most of the label, with deep vertical creases and heavy dirt on the upper rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the can's severe deformation, with a large blackened crease and less visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the caved-in top and more dirt accumulation, with the label partially obscured by folds.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the extent of crushing and a prominent diagonal crease, with some label text still visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue and white label with the orange 'Hamm's' brand name and stylized blue water imagery.
attribute_label_text: Hamm's BEER From the land of sky blue waters KING SIZE
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Extensive dents, creases, and dirt marks throughout the can; top is caved in and surface is heavily soiled.
